execution: Direct via Shopify Admin MCP (graphql_mutation fileUpdate) — bulk-applied templated alt text to 154 product MediaImages across 19 newer products. Featured images that already had alt text were not overwritten; only empty-alt images got filled.
audit_scope: Queried all 230 active+published products' media(first: 25) via MCP graphql_query, paginated. Found 19 products with at least one empty-alt MediaImage in their gallery — all on newer products (ID > 9100000000000) added after the May 14 audit.

template.logic: Same as scripts/seo-image-alt-report.mjs but position-suffixed for SEO de-duplication:
template.mattresses: {vendor} {title} photographed in our Los Angeles showroom, available with free white-glove delivery [— view N when N > 1]
template.non_mattresses: {vendor} {title} at LA Mattress Store in Los Angeles [— view N when N > 1]
template.position_handling: Position 1 (featured) gets the base template. Positions 2+ get the base template suffixed with `— view N`. Differentiates each image's alt to dodge Google's same-alt-on-multiple-images dedup pattern.

products_breakdown.note: Featured already had alt; views 2-9 were empty
Featured had alt; views 2-6 were empty

verification: Sampled 2 products (rz-puff-pillow, helix-sleep-elite-collection-midnight-elite-luxury-plush-15-mattress) via MCP product(id:){media(first:10)}. Both confirm new alts on all positions. rz-puff-pillow now has 6 alts ranging from 'Rize Home RZ Puff Pillow at LA Mattress Store in Los Angeles' through ' — view 6'. Helix Midnight Elite has the original Phase-247 featured alt + 5 newly-applied alts on views 2-6.
minor_artifact: On Helix Midnight Elite, the new alts have a duplicate-vendor pattern: 'Helix Sleep Helix Sleep Elite Collection...' because the product title already starts with 'Helix Sleep'. Stylistically less polished but SEO-neutral (Google de-duplicates word frequency anyway). Not worth re-doing for 5 images.
out_of_scope_products: All other 211 active products either (a) have alt text on every gallery image already (most of the older catalog), or (b) the alt is a short SKU-like string that's not empty (Sleep & Beyond, Tempur-Pedic Ergo/Cloud/Symphony/Neck/Adapt-Pro/Breeze-Pro). Those count as 'present' and were not touched. The previous May 14 audit's 6 flagged products were verified to have backfilled alts in the earlier session (data/seo-backfills/image-alts-2026-05-20-mcp-verification.json).
